summary: Drizzle SQLite-only .all() and .run() query builder methods also need Postgres migration
details: Beyond .get(), Drizzle ORM's .all() and .run() are SQLite-only query builder methods that don't exist on PGlite/Postgres. Counted ~38 .all() calls and ~45 .run() calls across packages/opencode/src. These cause silent failures or type errors when using PGlite. Fix pattern: .all() is unnecessary on PG (select returns all rows by default), .run() should be removed (PG runs the query by default). These should be fixed in a follow-up session after the .get() migration is complete.
